name: AI UX Patterns
description: Curated directory of AI UX / AI design patterns. Interactive demos on AI UX Playground.

patterns.title: Autonomous Mode Display
patterns.summary: Persistent signal when agent runs unattended

patterns.title: Escalation Thresholds
patterns.summary: Auto-demote autonomy when risk crosses a line

patterns.title: Per-Action Autonomy
patterns.summary: Autonomy scoped per capability, not per app

patterns.title: Pre-Task Cost Estimate
patterns.summary: Forecast tokens, dollars, and time before run

patterns.title: Reversibility Marking
patterns.summary: Label actions by how easily undone

patterns.title: Sandbox Preview
patterns.summary: Dry-run plan with explicit side effects before execute

patterns.title: Suggest / Confirm / Execute
patterns.summary: Three autonomy modes for AI agents

patterns.title: Activation Boundaries
patterns.summary: Explicit starts and stops for always-on agents

patterns.title: Interruptibility
patterns.summary: Single gesture to pause or cancel

patterns.title: Multi-User Awareness
patterns.summary: Identify speaker and scope to their permissions

patterns.title: Voice Confirmation
patterns.summary: Spoken approval for high-stakes voice actions

patterns.title: Chat Artifacts
patterns.summary: Open generated docs and code in a side panel

patterns.title: Interrupt and Resume
patterns.summary: Stop mid-response and continue with context

patterns.title: Repair Contract
patterns.summary: Retry with explicit delta and constraints

patterns.title: Response Refinement
patterns.summary: Modify AI responses with contextual actions

patterns.title: Human in the loop
patterns.summary: Require human approval before AI acts

patterns.title: Smart Diff
patterns.summary: Highlight and review what the model changed

patterns.title: Inventory Prediction
patterns.summary: Predict stock needs based on trends

patterns.title: Natural Language Filter
patterns.summary: Turn natural language into editable filters

patterns.title: Semantic Search
patterns.summary: Retrieve items by meaning, not keywords

patterns.title: Smart Comparison
patterns.summary: Build dynamic product or option comparison tables

patterns.title: Visual Search
patterns.summary: Find products or images from an uploaded photo

patterns.title: Prompt to UI
patterns.summary: Generate editable UI from a text prompt

patterns.title: Command Bar
patterns.summary: Jump to AI actions with a command palette

patterns.title: Context Chip Management
patterns.summary: Adding context sources via menu with removable chips

patterns.title: Gesture Input
patterns.summary: Draw or gesture to trigger AI actions

patterns.title: Input Mode Toggle
patterns.summary: Switch between text, voice, and dictation modes

patterns.title: Multimodal Input
patterns.summary: Combine images, files, and text in one turn

patterns.title: Prompt Starters
patterns.summary: Example prompts on an empty chat screen

patterns.title: Tool Switching in Composer
patterns.summary: Switch between AI capabilities within composer

patterns.title: Voice-to-Action
patterns.summary: Voice commands that trigger specific actions

patterns.title: AI Command History
patterns.summary: Recent AI commands with quick replay

patterns.title: Contextual Shortcuts
patterns.summary: Shortcuts that adapt to current task

patterns.title: Feature Discovery Feed
patterns.summary: Personalized feed of AI features to try

patterns.title: Use Case Wizard
patterns.summary: Guided setup based on user goals

patterns.title: Feedback
patterns.summary: Collect thumbs and comments to improve answers

patterns.title: Generative UI
patterns.summary: Render interactive UI components in the answer

patterns.title: Output Analytics
patterns.summary: Track which outputs users prefer/use most

patterns.title: Streaming
patterns.summary: Show replies token-by-token as they generate

patterns.title: Caching Indicators
patterns.summary: Show when cached results are used

patterns.title: Cross-Session Budget
patterns.summary: Spending caps that persist across chats and devices

patterns.title: Hard Budget Ceilings
patterns.summary: Enforceable caps that stop the agent

patterns.title: Model Selection UI
patterns.summary: Let users choose AI model (speed vs quality)

patterns.title: Performance Optimization Tips
patterns.summary: AI suggests ways to improve performance

patterns.title: Running Meters
patterns.summary: Live token and cost counters during execution

patterns.title: Agent Identity
patterns.summary: Stable name, version, and capabilities per agent

patterns.title: Audit Trail
patterns.summary: Complete log of AI decisions and data usage

patterns.title: Authentication Chains
patterns.summary: Legible identity trails across agent actions

patterns.title: Chain of Thought
patterns.summary: Reveal step-by-step reasoning behind an answer

patterns.title: Citations
patterns.summary: Attach verifiable sources to generated claims

patterns.title: Confidence Score
patterns.summary: Show how sure the model is about a claim

patterns.title: Data Ownership & Control
patterns.summary: User control over AI data usage

patterns.title: Responsibility Attribution
patterns.summary: Trace which agent or human caused each action

patterns.title: Retrieval Context Preview
patterns.summary: Preview retrieved context before acting on the answer

patterns.title: Source Browser
patterns.summary: Inspect source documents beside the answer

patterns.title: Verification Next Steps
patterns.summary: Concrete actions to validate uncertain output
